specific_question: By how many days did the new April 2024 staff training program reduce the CRM analysts' time to full productivity?
answer: The Elexion Automotive's April 2024 training program for the CRM analysts was shown to cut the time to full productivity by 7 days.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
